title: Global Steel Production Ex-China Remains In Contraction
section_path: Global Steel Production Ex-China Remains In Contraction
section_path_text: Global Steel Production Ex-China Remains In Contraction
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, we continue to see considerable economic weakness (unrelated to tariffs) outside of China. For the dry market, steel production weakness, in particular, remains very significant. Global steel production outside of China has now contracted on a year-on-year basis during six of the last eight months.
